description: Ground truth dataset for pre-classifier accuracy measurement. Each rule has a manually annotated expected_decision with justification.

rules.name: SE_Order_BPartner
rules.description: When a business partner is selected, populates price list, warehouse, sales rep, invoice rule, payment rule, delivery rule, payment term, bill-to location, and contact details. Shows warning if partner is blocked or credit limit exceeded.

rules.name: SE_Order_Organization
rules.description: When organization changes, determines available warehouses and sets default, calculates Cash VAT flag, applies document type rules based on BP and SOTrx context, generates next document number.

rules.name: SE_Order_BPartnerLocation
rules.description: When BP location changes, determines whether the organization uses Cash VAT accounting based on SOTrx type, org, BP, and location.

rules.name: SE_Order_Project
rules.description: When a project is selected, retrieves the project's default payment rule and payment term and populates them on the order header.
rules.justification: Projects will be supported but should not condition invoicing/payment rules

rules.name: SL_Charge
rules.description: When a charge is selected, retrieves the standard amount for that charge and auto-populates the charge amount field.

rules.name: SL_Order_DocType
rules.description: When document type changes, updates document number sequencing, sets payment/invoice/delivery rules based on subtype and BP preferences, handles quotation-to-order transition by appending quotation reference to description.

rules.name: SL_Order_PriceList
rules.description: When price list changes, copies the price list's currency and tax-inclusion flag to the order header.

rules.name: SL_Order_Product
rules.description: When product is selected on a line, populates UOM, net/gross unit prices, price list/limit/standard prices, discount percentage, attribute set instance, and applicable tax. Handles both net and gross price models.

rules.name: SL_Order_Amt
rules.trigger: QtyOrdered, PriceActual, Discount, LineNetAmt, C_Tax_ID, PriceList, M_AttributeSetInstance_ID, CANCELPRICEAD, Gross_Unit_Price (line)
rules.description: Heavyweight callout triggered by 9 fields. Recalculates line amounts, unit prices, discounts, and tax base. Enforces price limits, checks stock availability, handles net/gross price models, triggers quantity-change hooks for custom pricing rules.

rules.name: SL_Order_Tax
rules.description: Looks up the appropriate tax for the product based on order date, org location, warehouse, and partner billing/delivery location. Validates that org has a location configured.

rules.name: SL_Order_Charge_Tax
rules.description: Retrieves charge amount from charge master and determines applicable tax based on location and order context. Populates both charge amount and tax fields.

rules.name: SL_Order_Conversion
rules.description: Converts alternate UOM quantities to base quantity using conversion rates. Manages relationship between secondary UOM and primary ordered quantity, clearing one if the other is blank.

rules.name: SL_Order_UpdateLinesDate
rules.description: Warning-only callout. Detects date changes at header level and displays a warning prompting users to consider updating order line dates. Does not modify data.

rules.name: OperativeQuantity_To_BaseQuantity
rules.description: Converts alternate UOM quantity to base unit quantity using UOMUtil service. Updates the appropriate quantity field depending on window context (sales orders, purchase orders, shipments, invoices).

rules.name: Process Order
rules.description: Handles order document action processing: Complete, Void, Reactivate. Manages status transitions, inventory reservations, and financial impact. Includes pre/post-process hooks and validates BP currency before completion.

rules.name: Cancel and Replace Sales Order
rules.description: Creates a replacement order for an existing completed order. Validates source is a standard SO (not work/purchase order), creates new order in temporal status via CancelAndReplaceUtils, navigates to the new order.

rules.name: Add Payment
rules.description: Processes payments for orders by allocating amounts to payment schedule details. Handles overpayments as credits/refunds, applies GL item allocations. Creates FIN_PaymentDetail records linked to FIN_PaymentScheduleDetails.

rules.name: Copy Lines
rules.description: Copies order lines from selected source orders into the target order. Applies hook-based transformations at each stage (product/qty/attributes/prices/taxes). Auto-explodes non-stocked BOM products into component lines.

rules.name: Post
rules.description: Posts or unposts accounting entries for the order. Generates GL entries via ActionButtonUtility.processButton() or reverses them via resetAccounting(). Supports batch processing with per-record commit/rollback.

rules.name: Calculate Promotions
rules.description: Evaluates and applies promotional discounts and offers defined in the system to the order lines based on products, quantities, business partner, and order date.

rules.name: C_DocType PO/SO
rules.code: C_DocType.DocBaseType IN ('SOO', 'POO') AND C_DocType.IsSOTrx='@IsSOTrx@' AND AD_ISORGINCLUDED(...) AND IsReturn AND quotation filter
rules.description: Filters document types to show only Sales Order or Purchase Order types matching the current SOTrx flag, within the organization tree, matching return/quotation status.

rules.name: Price List isSOTrx
rules.description: Filters price lists to show only sales or purchase price lists depending on the SOTrx flag.

rules.name: C_BPartner Location - Ship To
rules.description: Filters BP locations to show only active ship-to addresses for the selected business partner.

rules.name: AD_Org Security validation
rules.description: Framework security validation. Filters organizations to show only those accessible by the current user's client and org context. Excludes summary orgs.

rules.name: C_Tax_IsSOTrx_Date
rules.code: C_TAX.VALIDFROM<=COALESCE(@DateInvoiced@,@DateOrdered@) AND SOPOTYPE matches SOTrx AND special handling for tax-undeductable orgs
rules.description: Filters taxes by validity date, sales/purchase type, client, and special handling for organizations with undeductable tax configuration.

rules.name: FIN_PaymentMethods with Account IsSOTrx Control
rules.code: EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM FIN_FinAcc_PaymentMethod WHERE Payin_Allow/Payout_Allow matches SOTrx)
rules.description: Filters payment methods to show only those configured to allow pay-in (for sales) or pay-out (for purchases) based on the SOTrx flag.

rules.name: Freight Amount visibility
rules.description: Shows the Freight Amount field only when the Freight Cost Rule is set to 'F' (fixed amount). Uses a window field reference.

rules.name: Gross Unit Price visibility
rules.description: Shows the Gross Unit Price field only when the price list is tax-inclusive. @GROSSPRICE@ is an auxiliary input computed via SQL from the price list's istaxincluded flag.

rules.name: Cancel and Replace visibility
rules.description: Shows Cancel and Replace button only when: order is completed, not already cancelled, not already replaced, is a standard SO (via auxiliary input), and the feature is enabled (session variable). Mixes field, auxiliary input, and session context variables.
rules.justification: Depends on Cancel and Replace process which was omitted

rules.name: Posted visibility
rules.description: Shows the Posted button only when the order is processed and the user has the Show Accounting preference enabled. Mixes a window field (@Processed@) with a session preference (@#ShowAcct@).
